title: heliopsis oppositifolia
intro: Heliopsis oppositifolia, also known as the prairie coreopsis, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heliopsis oppositifolia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
